name: Lyra Emberquill
flavour: A high-elf evoker who chases forbidden fire-lore through every ruin she can find.

traits.name: Arcane Recovery
traits.text: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totalling up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.text: Advantage on saves against being charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Researcher
traits.text: When you try to learn or recall a piece of lore, you often know where to find it.

actions.name: Quarterstaff
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Fire Bolt (cantrip)
actions.text: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d10) fire damage.

reactions.name: Shield (1st-level spell)
reactions.text: When hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, raise an invisible barrier: +5 AC until the start of your next turn, and no damage from magic missile.

dump: A driven high-elf evoker, ink-stained and singed, who can't resist a locked archive.

art.appearance: Slender high elf with ash-blonde hair tied back, faint burn-scars on her fingertips, sharp amber eyes
art.outfit: Travel-worn indigo robes with rolled sleeves, a bandolier of chalk and reagents, a satchel of scrolls
art.pose: One hand wreathed in a small controlled flame, the other holding an open spellbook
art.environment: A candlelit ruined library, shelves leaning, dust hanging in the light
art.style: Painterly high fantasy, warm candlelight against deep shadow

ideals: Knowledge — the path to power and self-improvement
bonds: My spellbook is my life's work; I would burn for it
flaws: I overlook the obvious while chasing the arcane
